subject: docs(guides): strengthen update guides for future maintenance
body:
DOCS_UPDATE_GUIDE.md:
- Added "Before Starting" section — always list all repos via
  GITHUB_ALL_REPO_TOKEN API first, never rely on cached lists
- Added private repo scrubbing items missed before: git clone URLs,
  project structure, internal doc links
- Updated private repos list (added sun-sea-o, four-ems)
- Added "Updating Live URLs" section for hosting changes
- Added README.md project table to "Adding a New Project" checklist
- Added trailing slash consistency note

PROJECT_DOCS_STATUS.md:
- Added "Last mirrored" date for freshness tracking
- Added scrubbing items: git clone URLs, project structure, internal
  doc links
- Added "Places to Update" checklist — all files that need changes
  when modifying a project

Tags: docs, maintenance, process
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: portfolio-site
Semver: patch

title: strengthen update guides for future maintenance
